title.ko: 교육용 또는 교시용의 기구; 맹인 또는 농아자와의 의사를 소통하기 위한 교습용기구; 모형; 유성의; 지구의; 지도; 도표
title.en: EDUCATIONAL OR DEMONSTRATION APPLIANCES; APPLIANCES FOR TEACHING, OR COMMUNICATING WITH, THE BLIND, DEAF OR MUTE; MODELS; PLANETARIA; GLOBES; MAPS; DIAGRAMS

definition.ko: 일반 교습구 작용의 일반 원리 수동 또는 기계적 G09B1/00, G09B3/00 전기적 G09B5/00, G09B7/00 질의 및 응답에 의한 작동 G09B3/00, G09B7/00 시뮬레이터 G09B9/00 특정목적을 지니는 교습구 필기, 속기, 제도, 회화; 타이프용 G09B11/00; 13/00 음악용; 독서용 G09B15/00; 17/00 과학 또는 기술훈련용의 모형 G09B23/00; 25/00 유성의; 지구의, 지도, 도표 G09B27/00, G09B29/00 그 외에 교습구 G09B19/00 맹인 또는 농아와의 교습 및 커뮤니케이팅 (COMMUNICATING) G09B21/00

title.en: Manually- or mechanically-operated educational appliances using elements forming or bearing symbols, signs, pictures, or the like which are arranged or adapted to be arranged in one or more particular ways
and having a support carrying or adapted to carry the elements
the elements each bearing a single symbol or a single combination of symbols
and being attachable to, or mounted on, the support
by means of magnets
by means of pins and holes
by means of ring-like securing elements
the elements being slidably mounted on the support
the elements each bearing a plurality of different symbols, signs, or combinations of symbols and signs, only one symbol, sign, or combination thereof, of each element to be used at a time
the elements being rotatable
and bearing the symbols on a surface parallel to the axis of rotation
and bearing the symbols on a surface perpendicular to the axis of rotation
the elements being in flexible-strip form, e.g. endless bands
the elements being arranged in fan form
the elements being slidable
wherein the elements are adapted to be arranged in co-operation with the support to form symbols
comprising elements to be used without a special support
the elements to be placed loosely in adjacent relationship
the elements being connectible by corresponding projections and recesses
the elements being connectible magnetically
to form symbols or signs by appropriate arrangement
Manually- or mechanically-operated teaching appliances working with questions and answers
of the type wherein the student is expected to construct an answer to the question which is presented or wherein the machine gives an answer to the question presented by the student
of chart form
of the multiple-choice answer type, i.e. where a given question is provided with a series of answers and a choice has to be made
of chart form
wherein one set of answers is common to a plurality of questions
of chart form

title.ko: 전기적 조작에 의하여 교습 기기
title.en: Electrically-operated educational appliances

definition.ko: 그룹 G09B5/08은 그룹 G09B5/02 ~ G09B5/06에 우선함

title.en: with visual presentation of the material to be studied, e.g. using film strip
with audible presentation of the material to be studied
with both visual and audible presentation of the material to be studied

title.ko: 복수의 학생 스테이션(station)에 개개로 정보의 제시를 공급하는 것
title.en: providing for individual presentation of information to a plurality of student stations

title.ko: 모든 학생 스테이션은 같은 정보를 동시에 제시할 수 있는 것(5/14가 우선)
title.en: all student stations being capable of presenting the same information simultaneously (G09B0005140000 takes precedence)

title.ko: 상이한 스테이션은 상이한 정보를 동시에 제시할 수 있는 것(5/14가 우선)
title.en: different stations being capable of presenting different information simultaneously (G09B0005140000 takes precedence)
with provision for individual teacher-student communication
Electrically-operated teaching apparatus or devices working with questions and answers
of the type wherein the student is expected to construct an answer to the question which is presented or wherein the machine gives an answer to the question presented by the student
characterised by modifying the teaching programme in response to a wrong answer, e.g. repeating the question or supplying a further explanation
of the multiple-choice answer type, i.e. where a given question is provided with a series of answers and a choice has to be made from the answers
providing for individual presentation of questions to a plurality of student stations
all student stations being capable of presenting the same questions simultaneously
different stations being capable of presenting different questions simultaneously
characterised by modifying the teaching programme in response to a wrong answer, e.g. repeating the question or supplying further information
wherein a set of answers is common to a plurality of questions
characterised by modifying the teaching programme in response to a wrong answer, e.g. repeating the question or supplying further information

title.ko: 교습 또는 훈련목적의 시뮬레이터 (Simulators)
title.en: Simulators for teaching or training purposes

title.ko: 승용물 또는 기타 운반기의 조종 교습구
title.en: for teaching control of vehicles or other craft

title.ko: 육상차의 조종 교습구
title.en: for teaching control of land vehicles

title.en: providing simulation in a real vehicle (G09B0009052000, G09B0009058000 take precedence)

title.ko: 원격지점에서 조종 및 관찰 가능한 모형 (G09B9/052, G09B9/058이 우선)
title.en: a model being viewed and manoeuvred from a remote point (G09B0009052000, G09B0009058000 take precedence)

title.ko: 시뮬레이트된 육상차로부터의 관찰(9/052, 9/058이 우선)
title.en: the view from a vehicle being simulated (G09B0009052000, G09B0009058000 take precedence)
characterised by provision for recording or measuring trainee's performance
for teaching control of cycles or motocycles
for teaching control of ships, boats, or other waterborne vehicles

title.en: with simulated flight- or engine-generated force being applied to aircraft occupant (G09B0009280000 takes precedence)

controlled by fluid actuated piston or cylinder ram

title.ko: 음극선관 표시장치에 의한 것(9/36이 우선)

providing simulation in a real aircraft flying through the atmosphere without restriction of its path

Automatically directing the course of the aircraft

Simulation of sonar
